ABOUT PCLOUD

13 years. 24 million users. Zero compromises.

Founded with a mission to empower individuals and businesses with secure, reliable cloud storage solutions that protect privacy and enhance productivity.

Cloud storage built on security, privacy, and reliable.

pCloud Storage

Seamlessly store, sync, and access your files from any device with our flagship cloud storage platform built for speed and reliability.

pCloud Encryption

Military-grade zero-knowledge encryption that ensures only you can access your sensitive files, even we cannot see them.

pCloud Pass

Secure password manager integrated with your cloud storage, protecting your credentials with the same zero-knowledge encryption.

13+ years of building trust

2013

pCloud founded in Switzerland with mission to protect digital privacy

2015

Reached 1 million users and launched mobile apps for iOS and Android

2017

Introduced pCloud Encryption with zero-knowledge architecture

2019

Expanded to 10M+ users and opened data centers in Luxembourg and Dallas

2021

Achieved 99.92% uptime and launched pCloud Pass password manager

2023

Surpassed 20M users and 400 petabytes of stored data worldwide

2026

Serving 24M+ users across 175+ countries with 500+ petabytes capacity

Building tomorrow's

infrastructure with

security at the core

“

Every line of code we write is an opportunity to strengthen user trust. Our engineering philosophy is simple: privacy and performance are not trade-offs—they're requirements.

Anton Titov, CTO

Leadership

Why engineers trust pCloud

Zero-Knowledge Encryption

You'll work with real cryptography — not API wrappers. AES-256, RSA-4096, and encryption architectures that even we can't decrypt.

Code Review Culture

Code review is mandatory. Every PR gets at least two sets of eyes. We learn from each other's code, not just review it.

Tech Debt Investment

20% of every sprint is reserved for tech debt. Non-negotiable. We invest in the codebase because we'll be maintaining it for decades.

Ship Fast, Ship Safely

Deploy 200+ times per day with confidence. Automated testing, staged rollouts, and instant rollback. Ship fast, ship safely.

Deep Work Culture

No micromanagement. Deep work blocks are protected. Async-first communication. You own your schedule and your output.

End-to-End Ownership

You design it, build it, ship it, and monitor it. No throwing code over the wall.

We hire for every platform

From kernel-level C to SwiftUI, from Electron to native Windows — our teams build for every major platform. Find your stack.

Security and privacy are not features. They're our foundation.

Zero-Knowledge Encryption

Swiss Privacy Standards

99.92% Uptime

Top 1% Team

13+ Years of Innovation

Ready to build something that matters?

pCloud is a Swiss cloud storage company founded in 2013.
